title: E. coli Culture

steps: Add 2 mL ( 3 mL also acceptable) of LB medium and the appropriate antibiotic that selects for the target strain into a 15 mL tube. Kanamycin 50 mg/mL Stock Solution by Bec18

Place the 15mL tube in the ThermoMixer at 37°C, 300 rpm, for 00:05:00 . ThermoMixer® C (Eppendorf, Catalog No. 2231000680, https://online-shop.eppendorf.us/US-en/Temperature-Control-and-Mixing-44518/Instruments-44519/Eppendorf-ThermoMixerC-PF-19703.html , https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/public/59947227e6d73a294911109bf315369471ff96594498507b7dd2590e2eb4789e/cc9sbcae7.jpg )
Swab a single colony on the agar plate with a sterile 1µL inoculation loop.
OR Dip a sterile 10 µL innoculation loop in a preexisting culture tube.
Innoculate the 15 mL tube with the loop.
Place the 15 mL tube in the thermomixer for 16 hours at 37°C and 300 rpm.
creator: Bec18
